title: delissea carlsonii
intro: Delissea carlsonii, also known as Hawaiian holly fern, is a flowering plant species endemic to the islands of Hawaii. Traditionally, it has been used in herbal medicine for its medicinal properties, including anti-inflammatory and antiseptic properties. The plant has been used to treat various health issues, such as fever, colds, and skin infections, due to its health benefits in reducing inflammation and promoting wound healing. Delissea carlsonii can be prepared as a herbal infusion or tea, and it has also been used in traditional Hawaiian medicine to create topical treatments and salves.
